title: Word frequency counter
user_goal: I have some text files and I want a tiny command-line tool that tells me which words show up most often. Can you make that?
user_goal_persona_note: Non-expert; describes the outcome, not the implementation.

hidden.summary: Read a text file (or stdin), tokenize into lowercase words, and print the top-N words by frequency, most frequent first. Default N=10.

acceptance_criteria.text: Runs without crashing on a UTF-8 text file.
Prints the most frequent word first.

ambiguity_points.question: What counts as a word?
ambiguity_points.gold: Maximal runs of alphanumeric characters; punctuation is a separator.

title: CSV column statistics
user_goal: I've got a CSV with some numbers in it and I want a small tool that prints basic stats — like the average and the min and max — for a column I pick. Can you build that?
user_goal_persona_note: Non-expert; describes the outcome, not the implementation.

hidden.summary: Read a CSV with a header row, select a numeric column by name, and print count, min, max, and mean for that column. Skip non-numeric/blank cells.

acceptance_criteria.text: Runs without crashing on a well-formed CSV with a header.
Selects the requested column by its header name.
Computes count, min, max, and mean correctly.
Skips blank/non-numeric cells rather than crashing.

ambiguity_points.question: How are non-numeric or empty cells handled?
ambiguity_points.gold: Skip them; they don't contribute to the stats.

ambiguity_points.question: Which column — by index or by header name?

info_units.desc: Column is chosen by header name.

title: Line and word counter
user_goal: Can you make me a little tool like 'wc' that tells me how many lines, words, and characters are in a text file?
user_goal_persona_note: Non-expert; describes the outcome, not the implementation.

hidden.summary: Read a text file (or stdin) and print the number of lines, words, and characters, in that order.

acceptance_criteria.text: Runs without crashing on a UTF-8 text file.

ambiguity_points.question: Does a trailing newline count as an extra line?

info_units.desc: Report lines, words, characters in that order.
